title: 50m X 2 Rolls Purple Ribbon for Balloons, Mooshy Purple Curling Ribbon 5mm String for Balloons Birthday Wedding Christmas Festival Party Decorations Gift Crafts Wrapping Flower
features: Size and Color of the Purple Balloon Ribbon: The purple curly ribbon set contains 2 rolls of balloon ribbons with a width of 5mm. The length of each roll is 50m, so there is a total length of 100m of the purple curly ribbon in each package. The available colours are white, silver, pink, blue, gold, green, orange, red, lime green, baby blue, purple and black.

Excellent Decorative Ballon Ribbon: With a slight luster on the surface, the curly ribbon is smooth and delicate. It can be used for balloon decoration or gift wrap to create an amazing decorative effect.

Tough and Smooth Ballon Ribbon: Our curly ribbon is strong and tough, not easy to break. It is made of durable PVC material, the colour of which will keep being rich, shiny and dazzling and will not fade even if it has been used for a long time.
Easy to Use Balloon Ribbon: You can use scissors to cut the curly ribbon of any size you want, and use a sharp tool to curl the ribbon to make it easy to tie and wont loose.

Multifunctional Balloon Ribbon: The balloon curly ribbon can be used to decorate various occasions, such as birthday parties, weddings, celebrations, can add the atmosphere and visual effects of the event, or used for DIY handicrafts, bows, bouquets
